german_requirement.title: Majority of Roles Do Not Require German Skills
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant share of positions remains accessible without German proficiency, highlighting a notable imbalance in language requirements.

pm_type.title: Core PMs Dominate Role Landscape
pm_type.subtitle: A significant gap exists between Core PMs and Customer-facing PMs, highlighting an imbalance in role accessibility.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate the Workforce
seniority.subtitle: With 57% of positions held by senior professionals, the market is clearly senior-heavy.

work_mode.title: On-site Work Dominates Despite Remote Options
work_mode.subtitle: A significant portion of employees still prefer on-site work over hybrid and remote arrangements.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, with remote options remaining limited.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Becoming Mainstream in Job Market
ai.subtitle: Nearly half of roles demand AI as a core responsibility, indicating a significant shift towards AI skills.

industry.title: Industry Roles Exhibit Equal Representation Across Sectors
industry.subtitle: No single sector dominates, but unclassified roles limit overall accessibility.
